data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Ticket call history by counter', but the evidence provided does not include any details or references to the ticket call history functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating its existence or how it operates. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm this requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of ticket call history by counter.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for ticket call history
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ticket call history by counter.
